title: Kumar Sanu Alka Yagnik
desc: Fall in love all over again with Kumar Sanu & Alka Yagnik! Their magical duets—full of passion, heartbreak, and nostalgia—are pure 90s gold.

title: R D Burman – Musical Maverick
desc: A powerhouse collection of R.D. Burman's iconic hits, blending innovation, emotion, and energy. From soulful ballads to electrifying grooves, experience the genius of Pancham Da that defined Bollywood's golden soundscape.

title: Best Of 70s – The Golden Era
desc: Step into Bollywood’s most soulful decade with this jukebox of evergreen melodies. A rich tapestry of romance, innocence, and timeless charm – pure nostalgia from the golden 70s.

title: Best Of 90s – Filmy Beats Reloaded
desc: Take a ride through the vibrant 90s with peppy love anthems, dramatic duets, and emotional melodies. This jukebox celebrates the signature style of Bollywood's musical revival decade.

title: Rajesh Khanna – The Superstar's Anthems
desc: Revisit the unmatched charm of Rajesh Khanna with this jukebox of unforgettable melodies. Romantic, philosophical, and heartfelt – these songs defined an era and a superstar.

title: Jeetendra Hits The Jumping Jack
desc: Dive into Jeetendra’s iconic hits—The Jumping Jack’s timeless energy! Relive the magic of Bollywood’s golden era with foot-tapping beats, romance, and pure nostalgia!

title: Neetu Singh Evergreen Hits
desc: Turn up the retro vibes with Neetu Singh’s greatest hits! A birthday playlist packed with nostalgia, romance, and endless charm.
